item.title: 𝗔 𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗙𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗚𝗜𝗥𝗢 𝗡𝗘𝗫𝗧 𝗚𝗘𝗡 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗢𝗨𝗥 𝗥𝗢𝗢𝗞𝗜𝗘𝗦 🩷 Lorenzo Finn has won the Giro d'Italia Next Gen. The U23 World Champion sealed the #Magl...
item.description: 𝗔 𝗣𝗘𝗥𝗙𝗘𝗖𝗧 𝗚𝗜𝗥𝗢 𝗡𝗘𝗫𝗧 𝗚𝗘𝗡 𝗙𝗢𝗥 𝗢𝗨𝗥 𝗥𝗢𝗢𝗞𝗜𝗘𝗦 🩷 Lorenzo Finn has won the Giro d'Italia Next Gen. The U23 World Champion sealed the #MagliaRosa in style with victory in the closing time trial to L’Aquila, after already taking the race lead with a brilliant stage win at Monte Livata earlier in the week. But this Giro was about much more than one result. 𝗛𝗲𝗿𝗲’𝘀 𝘄𝗵𝗮𝘁 𝗺𝗮𝗱𝗲 𝗶𝘁 𝘀𝗼 𝘀𝗽𝗲𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗳𝗼𝗿 𝘂𝘀: 🩷 𝗠𝗮𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗮 𝗥𝗼𝘀𝗮: Lorenzo Finn wins the overall classification. 🇮🇹 𝗠𝗮𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗮 𝗧𝗿𝗶𝗰𝗼𝗹𝗼𝗿𝗲: Lorenzo also finishes as best Italian rider. ❤️ 𝗠𝗮𝗴𝗹𝗶𝗮 𝗥𝗼𝘀𝘀𝗮: Davide Donati wins the points classification after an outstanding week. 🏆 𝗧𝗲𝗮𝗺𝘀 𝗰𝗹𝗮𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗮𝘁𝗶𝗼𝗻: Our Rookies top the team standings as well. 🥇 𝗧𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝘀𝘁𝗮𝗴𝗲 𝘄𝗶𝗻𝘀: A week full of aggressive, confident racing. 🤝 𝗔 𝗿𝗲𝗮𝗹 𝘁𝗲𝗮𝗺 𝗲𝗳𝗳𝗼𝗿𝘁: Gustave Blanc, Paul Fietzke, Max Bock and Gijs Schoonvelde all played key roles in making this success possible. To come away from Giro Next Gen with the Maglia Rosa, the Maglia Tricolore, the Maglia Rossa, three stage wins and the teams classification is more than we could have asked for. ➡️ Read the full story here: https://lnkd.in/g7zgPA-v __________ 📷 Twila Federica Muzzi

item.title: Nogle (få) ting er vigtigere end cykling 🥂 Hele holdet ønsker vores yngste rytter, Victor Johannsen, et stort tillykke ...
item.description: Nogle (få) ting er vigtigere end cykling 🥂 Hele holdet ønsker vores yngste rytter, Victor Johannsen, et stort tillykke med afslutningen af hans HHX-uddannelse på Team Danmarks elitesportslinje i Silkeborg. Selvom Victor havde mulighed for at gennemføre uddannelsen over fire år, valgte han at fuldføre den på blot tre år, samtidig med at han har satset målrettet på sin udvikling som cykelrytter. Når man kender en cykelrytters dagligdag - så er der virkelig stærkt gået. Hos BHS-PL Beton Bornholm vægter vi højt at rytterne får uddannelse. Vi ved, at det kræver tid og engagement at kombinere uddannelse med elitesport, og derfor giver vi plads til, at vores ryttere kan udvikle sig på begge områder. Som blot 19-årig har Victor stadig mange år foran sig til at forfølge sine ambitioner og drømme inden for cykelsporten, og vi glæder os til at følge hans fortsatte udvikling, både som menneske og som cykelrytter. KÆMPE TILLYKKE, VICTOR!

item.title: Nogle (få) ting er vigtigere end cykling 🥂 Hele holdet ønsker vores yngste rytter, Victor Johannsen, et stort tillykke...
item.description:
Nogle (få) ting er vigtigere end cykling 🥂
Hele holdet ønsker vores yngste rytter, Victor Johannsen, et stort tillykke med afslutningen af hans HHX-uddannelse på Team Danmarks elitesportslinje i Silkeborg.
Selvom Victor havde mulighed for at gennemføre uddannelsen over fire år, valgte han at fuldføre den på blot tre år, samtidig med at han har satset målrettet på sin udvikling som cykelrytter. Når man kender en cykelrytters dagligdag - så er der virkelig stærkt gået.
Hos BHS-PL Beton Bornholm vægter vi højt at rytterne får uddannelse. Vi ved, at det kræver tid og engagement at kombinere uddannelse med elitesport, og derfor giver vi plads til, at vores ryttere kan udvikle sig på begge områder.
Som blot 19-årig har Victor stadig mange år foran sig til at forfølge sine ambitioner og drømme inden for cykelsporten, og vi glæder os til at følge hans fortsatte udvikling, både som menneske og som cykelrytter.
KÆMPE TILLYKKE, VICTOR!

item.title: Sølv til Kristinn – og familiefred på Island! 🇮🇸🥈 De islandske mesterskaber er afsluttet, og endnu en medalje er komm...
item.description:
Sølv til Kristinn – og familiefred på Island! 🇮🇸🥈
De islandske mesterskaber er afsluttet, og endnu en medalje er kommet i hus til Kristinn Jónsson, som kørte sig til en flot sølvmedalje efter sin lillebror!
Fra start gjorde brødrene Kristinn og David Jónsson kort proces med resten af feltet. De to islandske kraftværker rev løbet fra hinanden, kørte væk tidligt og efterlod resten af konkurrenterne til at diskutere, hvem der egentlig skulle kæmpe om tredjepladsen. 🚴‍♂️💨
Så stort tillykke til David med det islandske mesterskab, og til Kristinn med sølvmedaljen. Sammen satte de et eftertrykkeligt punktum for mesterskaberne og viste, at Jónsson-familien stadig er noget af det farligste, man kan møde på islandske landeveje.

Sammen satte de et eftertrykkeligt punktum for mesterskaberne og viste, at Jónsson-familien stadig er noget af det farligste, man kan møde på islandske landeveje.

item.title: Union-X is ready for France 🇩🇰🇳🇴 Eight riders. Two nations. One team for the Tour de France. A GC leader. A sprinter...
item.description:
Union-X is ready for France 🇩🇰🇳🇴
Eight riders. Two nations. One team for the Tour de France.
A GC leader. A sprinter. Stage hunters. Road captains. Breakaway legs. Climbing support.
Swipe to meet the team.
🇳🇴 TOBIAS HALLAND JOHANNESSEN
Our GC leader.
After showing that he can stay with the very best in the mountains, Tobias returns to the Tour de France with a clear ambition: fighting for the top 5 overall.
The goal is big. So is the belief.
🇩🇰 MAGNUS CORT
A stage hunter with a finish.
Magnus can win from a smaller group, from a hard day, from a clever move — and from the kind of chaotic finale where experience matters.
One of those riders who gives us more than one way to win. Moustache power from Barcelona to Paris.
🇳🇴 JONAS ABRAHAMSEN
Last year’s Tour de France stage winner.
The Grenland Plow knows exactly what it takes to win from the breakaway — and he will always be a threat when the right move goes.
Jonas can also support both Søren and Tobias when the race demands it.
🇩🇰 ANDREAS KRON
Built for the hard days.
After 9th at Strade Bianche and 10th at La Flèche Wallonne this year, Andreas has shown again that he is dangerous on hilly stages, semi-mountain terrain and selective days where the breakaway can go all the way.
A strong engine with a sharp eye for the right move.
🇳🇴 ANDERS SKAARSETH
Our road captain.
Back at a very high level after a long injury comeback, Anders brings calm, experience and race understanding into the group.
The kind of rider who reads the race from inside the peloton — and helps make the right calls when it matters.
🇳🇴 TORSTEIN TRÆEN
Climbing support in the high mountains.
After finishing 9th overall at the Vuelta and spending several days in the leader’s jersey last year, Torstein knows what it takes when the GC group gets smaller and the altitude starts to bite.
His role can be quiet. His importance can be huge.
🇩🇰 ANTHON CHARMIG
A versatile stage hunter.
Anthon climbs well, reads races well and can be useful almost everywhere: crosswinds, lead-outs, demanding finales and breakaways.
A dangerous card when the race opens up — and a stage winner at Tour Auvergne Rhône-Alpes this seas
🇳🇴 SØREN WÆRENSKJOLD
Our sprinter.
Søren has been close to the big wins, and in this Tour de France he gets his chances on the flatter days. He can do a lot himself in the sprint — and his engine will also be important in the team time trial. The Hippo from Mandal is ready.

item.title: 🤍 BBK-Euskadik amaiera bikaina eman dio Torneo Euskaldunari. #TorneoEuskaldun @pikaza.asier elite mailako sailkapeneko...
item.description:
🤍 BBK-Euskadik amaiera bikaina eman dio Torneo Euskaldunari. #TorneoEuskaldun
@pikaza.asier elite mailako sailkapeneko irabazle izan da, marcomartincuevas sub-23 mailako sailkapen nagusia irabazi du, eta taldeak taldekako garaipena ere bereganatu du. Hiru sari, azken hilabete hauetan talde osoak egindako lana oso ondo laburbiltzen dutenak.
Erregularitatea, lasterketan presentzia, garaipen banatuak eta beti aurrean agertu den talde bat. Horrela azaltzen da Euskadi Fundazioaren prestakuntza-egituraren maila handia berresten duen garaipen hau, eta urratsak ematen jarraitzen duen belaunaldi baten lana.
Asteburu honetan iritsi zen erabakia, Tolosako eta Ataungo azken bi proba puntuagarriekin. Azken hitzordu oso gogorra izan zen: 126 kilometro, Abaltzisketatik hiru igarobide eta Lazkaomendi eta Urkillagako azken kateatua. Marco Martín eta Asier Castilla berriro ere aurrean izan ziren, garaipena jokatu zuen taldean sartuta eta laugarren eta bosgarren postuetan helmugaratuta.
Baina Torneo Euskaldun hau ez da azken asteburuan bakarrik irabazi. BBK-Euskadi protagonista izan da hasieratik amaierara, 15 proba puntuagarrietatik sei garaipen lortuta: Berriatua eta Markina-Xemein, Alain Suárez; Laukiz, Asier Castilla; Lazkao eta Natxitua, Marco Martín; eta Irun, Ander Otegi.
Zorionak, taldea! 🤍

item.title: 🔵 ACTUALIZACIÓN | Cat Ferguson Tras la caída sufrida en la primera etapa del pasado Giro d'Italia Women, fue sometida inicialmente a diversas pruebas para evaluar un posible traumatismo craneoencefálico (TCE) y múltiples contusiones. Tras su llegada a casa y durante las tres semanas posteriores, pese a mostrar una recuperación progresiva, la evolución clínica de Cat no fue la esperada. Por ello, se ampliaron los estudios diagnósticos, que finalmente han revelado la existencia de dos fracturas en el tobillo. La noticia supone un contratiempo para la corredora británica, que está completando una destacada segunda temporada con Movistar Team. Hasta la fecha, ha logrado tres victorias: el Trofe
item.description:
🔵 ACTUALIZACIÓN | Cat Ferguson

Tras la caída sufrida en la primera etapa del pasado Giro d'Italia Women, fue sometida inicialmente a diversas pruebas para evaluar un posible traumatismo craneoencefálico (TCE) y múltiples contusiones.

Tras su llegada a casa y durante las tres semanas posteriores, pese a mostrar una recuperación progresiva, la evolución clínica de Cat no fue la esperada. Por ello, se ampliaron los estudios diagnósticos, que finalmente han revelado la existencia de dos fracturas en el tobillo.

La noticia supone un contratiempo para la corredora británica, que está completando una destacada segunda temporada con Movistar Team. Hasta la fecha, ha logrado tres victorias: el Trofeo Llucmajor, una etapa de la Volta Femenina de la Comunitat Valenciana y la Navarra Women's Elite Classic.

Cat necesitará varias semanas de recuperación para garantizar una correcta consolidación de los huesos fracturados y la adecuada curación de las lesiones. Como consecuencia, no podrá competir en los próximos Campeonatos Nacionales ni en el Tour de Francia

¡Todo el ánimo del mundo, Cat! Estamos contigo 💙

— Movistar Team (@Movistar_Team) Jun 23, 2026

item.title: GUSTAV TOFT Han har været igennem en eksplosiv udvikling. På rekordtid. Dén rejse bliver vi nu en del af. Fredag d. 26....
item.description:
GUSTAV TOFT
Han har været igennem en eksplosiv udvikling. På rekordtid. Dén rejse bliver vi nu en del af.
Fredag d. 26. juni – ved Elite DM i enkeltstart – debuterer @gustav_toft på @airtox_carl_ras.
Vores relation begyndte for alvor i efteråret 2025 og udviklede sig hen over holdets vintertræningssamlinger. Hér deltog Gustav – og imponerede.
📸 @hestkjaer
@airtox @carlrasdk #DanskStilladsservice #StavnskærFragt @restaurantsuri @sjfbank #ShtTransport #DanskIndustriogSkadeservice @christianbitzcom #BitzPerformance @rema_1000_danmark @militaryequipmentdenmark
StavnskærElektrik JQT @konggaardcycling @willingable.cc @skodadanmark @roskildebilcenter @giantstoreandreaslund @giantbicycles @aavdaek Rico’sTV PcSchematic DanskRevision @laflammerouge js.dk @tangotapas @holbaekfrikirke @advodan_holbaek_kbh ensure @soren_frid_optique_nytsyn @demin.dk @gamst_blomster

item.title: Stars and stripes secured 🏆🇺🇸 Last weekend, grenke - Auto Eder U19 rider Enzo Hincapie soloed to the US National titl...
item.description:
Stars and stripes secured 🏆🇺🇸
Last weekend, grenke - Auto Eder U19 rider Enzo Hincapie soloed to the US National title — and took the first win of his season in the best possible way 🥇👏
The 18-year old now wears the famous stars and stripes jersey 🇺🇸
It’s the first time a rider from the Red Bull - BORA - hansgrohe family will race in the US national champion’s jersey.
Congrats, Enzo. Congrats to our U19 squad 🚀
__________
📷 Maximilian Fries / TWILA FEDERICA MUZZI / Flavio Moretti Photography

Congrats, Enzo. Congrats to our U19 squad 🚀 __________ 📷 @friesoooooo / @twilcha / @flaviomorettiphotography

item.title: One year has passed since our last Tour de France. We had an amazing 2025 season and made a strong start to 2026. The Gi...
item.description:
One year has passed since our last Tour de France.
We had an amazing 2025 season and made a strong start to 2026. The Giro d’Italia is already behind us — a race we will remember with three fantastic victories! 💗
And now, the Grande Boucle is calling again. The team is motivated, the team is ready, the team is looking ahead. 💪🇫🇷
@xds_bikes | @xlabworldwide
#XDSAstanaTeam #XDS #XLAB
🎥 @vandermeer.cinematography / XDS Astana Team / A.S.O. / @tntsportscycling

The team is motivated, the team is ready, the team is looking ahead. 💪🇫🇷 @xds_bikes | @xlabworldwide #XDSAstanaTeam #XDS #XLAB 🎥 @vandermeer.cinematography / XDS Astana Team / A.S.O. / @tntsportscycling

item.title: Sikke en start på vores Social Ride! Næsten 30 medarbejdere fra vores fantastiske sponsornetværk mødte op i går til året...
item.description: Sikke en start på vores Social Ride! Næsten 30 medarbejdere fra vores fantastiske sponsornetværk mødte op i går til årets første fælles social ride — og stemningen var helt i top. STARK Rønne lagde hus til som værter og sørgede ikke bare for en fed rute, men også for: 🥪 Lækker sandwich 🥤 Kolde drikke 🍬 Lidt sødt til ganen Det blev en eftermiddag med sved på panden, gode snakke og masser af smil. En kæmpe succes — og vi gør det igen i august! Tak til alle der deltog og gjorde eftermiddagen helt særlig. VI har verdens bedste sponsorer! Vi glæder os allerede til næste tur 🚴‍♀️✨

item.title: 🎪 Cette semaine, on joue à domicile 🇫🇷 Les Championnats de France débarquent à La Tour du Pin, et avec eux, le FCC Ci...
item.description:
🎪 Cette semaine, on joue à domicile 🇫🇷
Les Championnats de France débarquent à La Tour du Pin, et avec eux, le FCC Circus et la cheer zone officielle de l'équipe, organisée par nos fans les plus fous du Four Cycling Club 🔥
Chapiteau · Écran géant · DJ · Restauration locale · Buvette
Et les coureurs qui passent sous vos yeux, à chaque tour !
📍 À 3 km de l'arrivée (route des plagnes, 38110 La Chapelle de la Tour) / du 25 au 28 juin / entrée libre
Vous avez peur de râter les autres événements sportifs du week-end ? Le FCC a prévu un écran géant pour ne rien manquer 📺
• L’ensemble des courses 🚲
• 🇫🇷 France – Norvège (lien de réservation disponible en bio Instagram du FCC)
• 🏉 La finale du Top 14 (lien de réservation disponible en bio Instagram du FCC)
On vous attend nombreux pour partager ce grand week-end de sport, de convivialité et de fête ! ❤
#DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM

item.title: Sikke en start på vores Social Ride! Næsten 30 medarbejdere fra vores fantastiske sponsornetværk mødte op i går til året...
item.description:
Sikke en start på vores Social Ride!
Næsten 30 medarbejdere fra vores fantastiske sponsornetværk mødte op i går til årets første fælles social ride — og stemningen var helt i top.
STARK Rønne lagde hus til som værter og sørgede ikke bare for en fed rute, men også for:
🥪 Lækker sandwich
🥤 Kolde drikke
🍬 Lidt sødt til ganen
Det blev en eftermiddag med sved på panden, gode snakke og masser af smil.
En kæmpe succes — og vi gør det igen i august!
Tak til alle der deltog og gjorde eftermiddagen helt særlig. VI har verdens bedste sponsorer!
Vi glæder os allerede til næste tur 🚴‍♀️✨

item.title: Mads Landbo genvinder U23 DM i enkeltstart 🇩🇰 Lørdag lagde Skælskør asfalt til en fuld dag med enkeltstart, da der ble...
item.description: Mads Landbo genvinder U23 DM i enkeltstart 🇩🇰 Lørdag lagde Skælskør asfalt til en fuld dag med enkeltstart, da der blev kørt U23 DM for herrer, 2. afdeling af DEMIN Cup for både herrer og damer og enkeltstart for alle masters kategorier 👏 Med en imponerende gennemsnitsfart på 52,11 km/t over de 24,7 km kunne coloQuick-rytteren @landbomads igen træde op på den øverste skammel på podiet som U23-Danmarksmester i enkeltstart 🔝 🔗 Du kan læse mere om weekenden på cyklingdanmark.dk.

item.title: Les rencontres du vélodrome : Pierre Bertrand et Raphael Jeune
JEU CONCOURS – Derrière chaque coureur, il y a des supporters 💙 Pendant le Tour de France, votre soutien fait toute la ...
item.description: JEU CONCOURS – Derrière chaque coureur, il y a des supporters 💙 Pendant le Tour de France, votre soutien fait toute la différence ! Montrez-nous comment vous encouragez @decathloncmacgmteam et tentez de gagner l’un des 3 maillots dédicacés par nos coureurs du Tour. Pour participer : 📸 Prenez une photo avec votre maillot DECATHLON CMA CGM, votre tee-shirt Replica ou votre drapeau de l’équipe. 📲 Publiez-la sur Instagram en identifiant notre compte officiel @decathloncmacgmteam et en utilisant le hashtag #decathloncmacgm. ✍️Commentez cette publication Les 3 plus belles photos seront republiées sur notre compte Instagram et leurs auteurs remporteront un maillot dédicacé ! Au bord des routes, devant votre télévision, entre amis ou en famille… partagez avec nous votre façon de vivre le Tour aux côtés de l’équipe ! 💙 🔗 Lien vers la boutique en bio /// CONTEST – Behind every rider, there are fans 💙 During the Tour de France, your support makes all the difference! Show us how you support @decathloncmacgmteam and get a chance to win one of 3 jerseys signed by our Tour riders. How to participate: 📸 Take a photo wearing your DECATHLON CMA CGM jersey, Replica t-shirt, or team flag. 📲 Post it on Instagram by tagging our official account @decathloncmacgmteam and using the hashtag #decathloncmacgm. ✍️ Comment on this post. The 3 best photos will be reshared on our Instagram account, and their creators will win a signed jersey! By the roadside, in front of your TV, with friends or family… share with us how you experience the Tour alongside the team! 💙 🔗 Link to the shop in bio #DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM

item.description: HYPERFORMANCE WorldTour speed landing at Paris Fashion Week. Ahead of the Tour de France, the @greenedgecycling WT26 race system will be on display in Paris — a materials exhibition in WorldTour race tech, and a first look at the GreenEDGE swap out kit. Opening Reception: Thursday 25 June | 6:00–8:00pm 36 Rue Étienne Marcel Exhibition: 26–28 June | 11am–6pm

item.title: 🧡 Maila handiko astea Euskaltel-Euskadirentzat. Jokin Murguialdayk mendian distira egin zuen, Route d’Occitanien 9. pos...
item.description:
🧡 Maila handiko astea Euskaltel-Euskadirentzat. Jokin Murguialdayk mendian distira egin zuen, Route d’Occitanien 9. postua eta Andorra Clàssicen 7. postu bikaina lortuta; han, Mikel Bizkarra Etxegibel eta Txomin Juaristi ere eguneko ihesaldian protagonista izan ziren.
Talde laranjak sentsazio onak utzi zituen Esloveniako Itzulian ere, Gotzon Martín Sanz, Jon Agirre Egaña eta Xabier Berasategi sailkapen nagusiko lehen 20en artean sartuta, hainbat jardunalditan aurreko postuetan lehiatu ondoren.
💜 LABORALKutxaTeam taldeak Volta a Catalunya osatu zuen Tiril Jørgensen erreferente nagusi izanda. Norvegiarrak 13. postuan amaitu zuen sailkapen nagusian, hiru eguneko gehieneko eskakizuneko lasterketa baten ondoren; nazioarteko mailako proba izan zen, eta talde morea pelotoiko txirrindulari onenetako batzuen aurrean neurtu zuen berriro.
🤍 BBK-Euskadik amaiera bikaina eman zion #Torneo Euskalduni. @pikaza.asier elite mailako sailkapeneko irabazle izan zen, marcomartincuevas sub-23 mailako garaipena eskuratu zuen, eta taldeak taldekako sailkapen nagusia ere bereganatu zuen, Euskadi Fundazioaren egiturak denboraldi osoan egindako lan handia berretsiz.
❤️ Team Iparralde talde juniorreko mutilek ezin izan zuten beren kalitatea erakutsi Gipuzkoa Itzulian. Etapakako probak igandeko eta asteleheneko etapak bertan behera utzi behar izan zituen Euskal Herriko bero-boladaren ondorioz. Txirrindulari nabarmenena Bastian Laffitte izan zen, seigarren Idiazabalgo hasierako erlojupekoan eta Mendaroko lineako etapan top-10etik gertu.
💚 Gainera, Euskadi Fundazioaren txirrindularitza paralinpikoko proiektuak bidea egiten jarraitzen du, inklusioa, ikusgarritasuna eta lehiakortasuna ardatz hartuta, euskal txirrindularitzaren balioak modalitate honetara ere eramanez. Joan den asteburuan txirrindularitza paralinpikoko promesak elkartu ziren, hazten jarraitzeko.

item.description: 🧡 Maila handiko astea Euskaltel-Euskadirentzat. Jokin Murguialdayk mendian distira egin zuen, Route d’Occitanien 9. postua eta Andorra Clàssicen 7. postu bikaina lortuta; han, @bizkarrita eta @txominjuaristi ere eguneko ihesaldian protagonista izan ziren. Talde laranjak sentsazio onak utzi zituen Esloveniako Itzulian ere, @gotzonski, @jon_agirre97 eta @berasategixabi sailkapen nagusiko lehen 20en artean sartuta, hainbat jardunalditan aurreko postuetan lehiatu ondoren. 💜 @laboral_kutxa_team taldeak Volta a Catalunya osatu zuen @tirilpiril erreferente nagusi izanda. Norvegiarrak 13. postuan amaitu zuen sailkapen nagusian, hiru eguneko gehieneko eskakizuneko lasterketa baten ondoren; nazioarteko mailako proba izan zen, eta talde morea pelotoiko txirrindulari onenetako batzuen aurrean neurtu zuen berriro. 🤍 BBK-Euskadik amaiera bikaina eman zion #Torneo Euskalduni. @pikaza.asier elite mailako sailkapeneko irabazle izan zen, @marcomartincuevas sub-23 mailako garaipena eskuratu zuen, eta taldeak taldekako sailkapen nagusia ere bereganatu zuen, Euskadi Fundazioaren egiturak denboraldi osoan egindako lan handia berretsiz. ❤️ @team_iparralde talde juniorreko mutilek ezin izan zuten beren kalitatea erakutsi Gipuzkoa Itzulian. Etapakako probak igandeko eta asteleheneko etapak bertan behera utzi behar izan zituen Euskal Herriko bero-boladaren ondorioz. Txirrindulari nabarmenena @bastianlaffitte izan zen, seigarren Idiazabalgo hasierako erlojupekoan eta Mendaroko lineako etapan top-10etik gertu. 💚 Gainera, Euskadi Fundazioaren txirrindularitza paralinpikoko proiektuak bidea egiten jarraitzen du, inklusioa, ikusgarritasuna eta lehiakortasuna ardatz hartuta, euskal txirrindularitzaren balioak modalitate honetara ere eramanez. Joan den asteburuan txirrindularitza paralinpikoko promesak elkartu ziren, hazten jarraitzeko.

item.title: Five days. Countless attacks. One memorable week in Switzerland. The Human Powered Health team delivered a series of strong perfor...
item.description: Five days. Countless attacks. One memorable week in Switzerland. The Human Powered Health team delivered a series of strong performances at the 2026 Tour de Suisse Women, highlighted by Lily Williams’ impressive second-place finish on Stage 3, and two additional top-10 stage placings. The race concluded with a determined effort in the mountains from Nina Buijsman, showcasing the resilience and fighting spirit of the team on the toughest stage of the week. Take a look through our gallery to relive the action, the teamwork, and the moments that defined our Tour de Suisse Women campaign. https://lnkd.in/e9Ugvj57 #HPHCycling #TrueHealthIsSelfMade #UCIWWT #TourdeSuisse #Gallery

item.title: Four stages out of five. At the Tour de Suisse, UAE Team Emirates didn’t just win races, they controlled them. Every bre...
item.description: Four stages out of five. At the Tour de Suisse, UAE Team Emirates didn’t just win races, they controlled them. Every breakaway, every time gap, every decisive moment of the week carried the same jersey, the same spirit, the same uncompromising approach to racing. When the race needed an attacker, they had one. When it needed precision, they delivered it. When it needed a closer, Pogacar was already gone. This is what a team built to dominate looks like in motion. The entire squad rode in the Aeroshade 2.0 UAE Team Emirates Edition, one eyewear, one identity, one standard across every rider on the road. Pogacar alone wore the Aeroshade 2.0 European Champion / World Champion Limited Edition, the mark of someone who carries a different weight on his shoulders and never lets it slow him down. #weareuae #sciconsports #unleashgreatness

item.title: 🕊️ La S.A. Vendée Cyclisme vient d’apprendre avec une immense tristesse le décès de Saïd Haddou. Ancien coureur de notre structure, il a marqué l’histoire de l’équipe par sa gentillesse. Parmi ses plus beaux succès sous nos couleurs figurent notamment ses deux victoires sur le Tro Bro Léon. Nous adressons nos plus sincères condoléances à sa famille et à ses proches. Toutes nos pensées les accompagnent dans cette épreuve. 🖤
item.description:
🕊️ La S.A. Vendée Cyclisme vient d’apprendre avec une immense tristesse le décès de Saïd Haddou.

Ancien coureur de notre structure, il a marqué l’histoire de l’équipe par sa gentillesse. Parmi ses plus beaux succès sous nos couleurs figurent notamment ses deux victoires sur le Tro Bro Léon.

Nous adressons nos plus sincères condoléances à sa famille et à ses proches.

Toutes nos pensées les accompagnent dans cette épreuve. 🖤

— Team TotalEnergies (@TeamTotalEnrg) Jun 22, 2026

item.title: 🕊️ La S.A. Vendée Cyclisme vient d’apprendre avec une immense tristesse le décès de Saïd Haddou. Ancien coureur de notr...
item.description:
🕊️ La S.A. Vendée Cyclisme vient d’apprendre avec une immense tristesse le décès de Saïd Haddou.
Ancien coureur de notre structure, il a marqué l’histoire de l’équipe par sa gentillesse. Parmi ses plus beaux succès sous nos couleurs figurent notamment ses deux victoires sur le Tro Bro Léon.
Nous adressons nos plus sincères condoléances à sa famille et à ses proches.
Toutes nos pensées les accompagnent dans cette épreuve. 🖤

item.title: Dans le cyclisme pro, tout se joue aussi en coulisses 🚴‍♂️ On a suivi Marc Rousseau l’ostéopathe du Team TotalEnergies,...
item.description: Dans le cyclisme pro, tout se joue aussi en coulisses 🚴‍♂️ On a suivi Marc Rousseau l’ostéopathe du Team TotalEnergies, présent auprès de l’équipe depuis 14 ans : du matin avec la préparation des bidons, aux ravitaillements en pleine course, jusqu’aux soins après l’étape. Un rôle clé, entre accompagnement physique (dos, cervicales…) et mental, dans un sport ultra exigeant. Et pour suivre le rythme ? Les Toyota RAV4 KINTO accompagnent l’équipe toute la journée : pratiques, accessibles, avec tout l’espace nécessaire pour le matériel. Une journée au cœur de la performance ⚡ 👉 Découvrez les coulisses en vidéo #KINTO #KINTOFrance #Partenariat #AllezTotalEnergies⚡ #mobilité

item.title: Dernière ligne droite avant le Tour de France. L’équipe est actuellement en stage à @arc1950. Un cadre et un terrain de ...
item.description: Dernière ligne droite avant le Tour de France. L’équipe est actuellement en stage à @arc1950. Un cadre et un terrain de jeu parfait pour se préparer. Cette collaboration nous offre la possibilité de travailler dans les meilleures conditions pour être au rendez-vous en juillet. /// Final stretch before the Tour de France. The team is currently in training camp at @arc1950, an ideal environment and terrain for a preparation block. This partnership allows us to train in the best possible conditions as we build towards peak performance in July. #DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM #ARC1950

item.title: GIVEAWAY ALERT 🎁 12 Signed Jerseys Up for Grabs! ✅ To celebrate the start of the Tour de France, @premiertechcycling, a...
item.description: GIVEAWAY ALERT 🎁 12 Signed Jerseys Up for Grabs! ✅   To celebrate the start of the Tour de France, @premiertechcycling, and @alpecin.premiertech are teaming up to give away 12 signed jerseys from our pro riders!    Here’s what you can win:  🇳🇱Mathieu van der Poel — World Champion CX jersey  🇳🇱Mathieu van der Poel — Alpecin-Premier Tech jersey, WC sleeves  🇧🇪Jasper Philipsen — Alpecin-Premier Tech jersey  🇧🇪Niels Vandeputte — Belgian Champion Gravel jersey  🇮🇹Stefano Viezzi — Italian Champion U23 CX jersey  🇨🇦Hugo Houle — Alpecin-Premier Tech jersey, Canadian sleeves  🇫🇷Florian Sénéchal — Alpecin-Premier Tech jersey, French sleeves  🇨🇭Silvan Dillier — Alpecin-Premier Tech jersey, Swiss sleeves  🇫🇷Tibor Del Grosso — Dutch Champion CX jersey  🇦🇺Samuel Gaze — Alpecin-Premier Tech jersey, WC sleeves MTB  🇧🇪Lindsay Devylder — World Champion Track (Omnium) jersey  🩷Alpecin-Premier Tech Team jersey — Giro d’Italia edition   HOW TO ENTER 🚀 Follow @premiertechcycling and @alpecin.premiertech Like this post  Comment below tagging 2 friends who’d love to win Bonus: Share this post to your story to double your chances! Winners announced: Stay tuned right after entries close, around the team presentation for the Tour de France! Good luck, APT Fans ! #AlpecinPremierTech #PremierTechCycling #TDF2026 #Giveaway

item.title: U23 DM TT – et stærkt statement fra Lucca Bennetzen 🔥 Efter kun 3 uger i Team Give Steel-trøjen leverer Lucca Bennetzen...
item.description:
U23 DM TT – et stærkt statement fra Lucca Bennetzen 🔥
Efter kun 3 uger i Team Give Steel-trøjen leverer Lucca Bennetzen en flot 8. plads ved DM U23 enkeltstart.
Et stærkt resultat i sig selv – men endnu vigtigere: et klart tegn på, at vi er på rette vej.
Lucca bliver samtidig næstbedste førsteårs elite-rytter, kun overgået af Johan Eltoft fra Tudor Cycling. Det viser både niveauet, potentialet og den udvikling, vi allerede er i gang med.
Hos Team Give Steel arbejder vi ikke kortsigtet. Vi bygger ryttere op over tid, med struktur, tålmodighed og stærk coaching. Luccas 8. plads er ikke endestationen – det er kun første skridt på rejsen.
Et stort tillykke skal også lyde til Mads Landbo, som tog en sikker sejr. Mads blev allerede sidste år coachet til DM-sejr hos Team Give Steel, og han gentager nu triumfen med stærk forberedelse og målrettet arbejde bag præstationen.
Vi arbejder videre med Lucca og vores øvrige unge ryttere – og vi ser frem mod DM i næste uge.
Udvikling. Retning. Resultater.
#wegrowpeople Give Steel A/S Alubox.com official site 🇩🇰 ES16 Hjælperytteren BAK OPTICS Kalas Sportswear ABUS Cycling Carl Ras @yourvisualsdk Casper Janning 📸 @twobirdsdk Faurbohus & Brøchner COLNAGO August Erhverv & Sport CleverCoffee Solaray Danmark

Vi bygger ryttere op over tid, med struktur, tålmodighed og stærk coaching. Luccas 8. plads er ikke endestationen – det er kun første skridt på rejsen. item.description: Five stages. Three wins. @tadejpogacar takes home the Tour de Suisse, delivering a performance built on consistency, strength, and attention to every detail. As always, Enervit is by his side with a tailored nutrition strategy to support every phase of performance: • steady carbohydrate intake, • targeted electrolyte replenishment, • optimized recovery between stages. Because at the highest level, every detail counts. Tadej Pogačar chooses Enervit. #enervit #enervitsport

item.title: What’s going on behind the scenes of a World Tour race? For Carsten Jeppesen, the work begins long before a train of rid...
item.description: What’s going on behind the scenes of a World Tour race? For Carsten Jeppesen, the work begins long before a train of riders starts pedalling in the race to be first across the finish line. He is Director of Performance Operations at Netcompany INEOS and is, in short, responsible for making sure everything runs smoothly. We followed him in the lead-up to Copenhagen Sprint.

item.title: Four Cycling Club x DECATHLON CMA CGM TEAM 🇫🇷🔥 Venez soutenir l’équipe aux championnats de France dans la fan zone du...
item.description:
Four Cycling Club x DECATHLON CMA CGM TEAM 🇫🇷🔥
Venez soutenir l’équipe aux championnats de France dans la fan zone du FCC Circus !
Au programme :
🔹 Suivez l’ensemble des courses dans la fan zone sur le parcours (à 3km de l’arrivée)
🔹 Buvette
🔹 Restauration : côtes de bœuf, hamburgers, sandwichs, glaces
🔹 Ecran géant pour suivre les grands rendez-vous sportifs du week-end (France-Norvège / Finale du Top 14 - sur réservation, lien dans l’événement)
On vous attend nombreux pour ce week-end de folie ! 😍
#DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM

item.title: 𝙇𝙀𝙑𝙀𝙇 𝙐𝙋 📈 𝙀𝙋𝙄𝙎𝙊𝘿𝙀 2: 𝙀𝙧𝙞𝙣 𝘽𝙤𝙤𝙩𝙝𝙢𝙖𝙣 𝙗𝙧𝙤𝙪𝙜𝙝𝙩 𝙩𝙤 𝙮𝙤𝙪 𝙗𝙮 𝙇𝙞𝙫 “𝘛𝘩𝘦 𝘸𝘦𝘢𝘵𝘩𝘦𝘳 𝘪𝘴 𝘱𝘳𝘦𝘵𝘵𝘺 𝘣𝘳𝘶𝘵𝘢𝘭 𝘣𝘶𝘵 𝘐 𝘵𝘩𝘪𝘯𝘬 𝘸𝘩𝘦𝘯 𝘐 𝘸𝘢𝘴 𝘺𝘰𝘶𝘯𝘨𝘦𝘳 𝘐 𝘥𝘪𝘥𝘯’𝘵 𝘬𝘯𝘰𝘸 𝘢𝘯𝘺 𝘥𝘪𝘧𝘧𝘦𝘳𝘦𝘯𝘵, 𝘐 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘵𝘩𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩𝘵 𝘺𝘰𝘶 𝘫𝘶𝘴𝘵 𝘨𝘦𝘵 𝘵𝘰𝘶𝘨𝘩 𝘢𝘴 𝘯𝘢𝘪𝘭𝘴.” 🍿

item.title: KONKURRENCE 🚴‍♂️🔥 Det nye Pro Cycling Manager 2026 er landet, og som noget helt særligt er vores eget hold, BHS – PL...
item.description:
KONKURRENCE 🚴‍♂️🔥
Det nye Pro Cycling Manager 2026 er landet, og som noget helt særligt er vores eget hold, BHS – PL Beton Bornholm, igen med i spillet!
Vi udlodder 3 koder til Pro Cycling Manager 2026 – og du kan vinde én af dem!
For at deltage skal du blot:
👉Nævne 5 af vores fantastiske sponsorer i kommentarfeltet.
Det er dem, der gør vores sæson mulig – og nu kan de også hjælpe dig med at vinde en PCM‑kode.
Vi trækker 3 vindere blandt alle deltagere på onsdag kl 12.
Held og lykke – og kæmpe tak til alle vores sponsorer for støtten 🖤💙
PS: konkurrencen er ikke støttet af hverken Facebook, Meta eller andre løjer, som du kan komme på.

item.title: El 🇧🇪 #BaloiseBelgiumTour llegó hoy a su final con una nueva actuación sólida de Carlos Canal, que completó la última...
item.description:
El 🇧🇪 #BaloiseBelgiumTour llegó hoy a su final con una nueva actuación sólida de Carlos Canal, que completó la última etapa con el grupo principal y aseguró la sexta posición en la clasificación general de una carrera exigente y de mucho nivel.
Un resultado más para Carlos, que sigue respondiendo carrera tras carrera tras varios meses al pie del cañón. 👊
—
The 🇧🇪 #BaloiseBelgiumTour came to an end today with another strong performance from Carlos Canal, who finished the final stage with the peloton and secured sixth place overall in a demanding race featuring a high-level field.
Another strong result for Carlos, who continues to deliver race after race after several months of consistent racing. 👊
📷 @SprintCycling
#RodamosJuntos | Movistar España

Un resultado valioso más para Carlos, que sigue respondiendo carrera tras carrera tras varios meses al pie del cañón. 👊 — The 🇧🇪 #BaloiseBelgiumTour came to an end today with another strong performance from Carlos Canal, who finished the final stage with the peloton and secured sixth place overall in a demanding race featuring a high-level field. item.description:
MAGLIA ROSA 🩷
Lorenzo Finn wins the final time trial and seals the overall victory at the Giro Next Gen 🏆
Three stage wins. D A V I D E D O N A T I 🇮🇹 wins the points classification. Lorenzo also wins the best Italian rider classification. And our Rookies take home the team classification 🤯👏
A massive race from the whole team, from the first stage to the final TT.
⏭️ Swipe through the carousel for the moments of the day 📸
__________
📷 TWILA FEDERICA MUZZI / 🎥 Vanvid

item.title: 🇨🇭 An outstanding performance from @lennymrtz on the final stage of the @tourdesuisse_official ❤️ After spending the d...
item.description: 🇨🇭 An outstanding performance from @lennymrtz on the final stage of the @tourdesuisse_official ❤️ After spending the day in the breakaway and taking the HC Col de la Croix KOM sprint, where he won the @rideforgino prize, Lenny attacked on the final climb and looked set for a memorable solo victory. He fought all the way to the line, only to be overtaken by Pogačar inside the final kilometre, finishing just 7 seconds behind. A brave ride to be proud of! 👏👏👏 #RideAsOne #rideforGino #TourdeSuisse 📸 @sprintcycling

item.title: TOBIAS AAGAARD VINDER I FLOT DM-TEST I SILKEBORG Team ColoQuick kunne for tredje år i træk hente sejren i Silkeborg-løbe...
item.description:
TOBIAS AAGAARD VINDER I
FLOT DM-TEST I SILKEBORG
Team ColoQuick kunne for tredje år i træk hente sejren i Silkeborg-løbet, da Tobias Aagaard efter ar have været med i et vellykket udbrud kunne spurte sig til en sejr foran Christian Gorm Albrechtsen fra Herning og Gustav Dahl fra Team Give Steel.
Med en syvendeplads til Anders Vos og yderligere to ryttere i TOP-20, Malte Hellerup som nummer 13 og Otto Jølving som nummer 18, fik Skive-holdet en fornem generalprøve til den kommende uges danske mesterskaber i Herning.
Det var også en tilfreds og glad sportsdirektør, Changiz Changizi, der kunne se tilbage på den tredje sejr i træk på hans hjemmebane i Silkeborg.
- Vi kom med store forhåbninger, og at det sluttede med en plads til Tobias øverst på podiet var bare alletiders optakt inden DM, siger han.
- Vi var ikke i flertal i feltet, men vi var enige om at vi rent taktisk skulle vende det til vores fordel, siger Changiz Changizi. Da der manglede omkring 40-50 kilometer var Tobias Aagaard utrolig vågen, da han sammen med to andre slap afsted.
De tre udbrydere fik opbygget et pænt hul, mens de øvrige ColoQuick-ryttere bakkede op i feltet på en rute med mange bakker og højdemeter.
- Alle drenge fik virkelig brugt sig selv både individuelt og kollektivt, og vi fik den sejr vi kom efter, siger sportsdirektøren. Han har også massere af ros til Tobias Aagaard, der viste stor styrke og kvalitet, både i udbruddet, og ikke mindst i finalen.
De tre udbrydere holdt hjem med et forspring på 46 sekunder til et splittet hovedfelt, der kom i mål med få sekunders afstand.
LØBET PÅ AMAGER STOPPET
EFTER SLEMT STYRT
De sjællandske ColoQuick-ryttere skulle have testet deres DM-form i Amager CR-løbet, men løbet blev stoppet efter knap 100 kilometer, da en af rytterne blev ramt af en bil og blev så alvorligt kvæstet, at han måtte hentes af en ambulance og køres på hospitalet.

Han har også massere af ros til Tobias Aagaard, der viste stor styrke og kvalitet, både i udbruddet, og ikke mindst i finalen. De tre udbrydere holdt hjem med et forspring på 46 sekunder til et splittet hovedfelt, der kom i mål med få sekunders afstand. LØBET PÅ AMAGER STOPPET EFTER SLEMT STYRT De sjællandske ColoQuick-ryttere skulle have testet deres DM-form i Amager CR-løbet, men løbet blev stoppet efter knap 100 kilometer, da en af rytterne blev ramt af en bil og blev så alvorligt kvæstet, at han måtte hentes af en ambulance og køres på hospitalet. - Det var selvfølgelig den helt rigtige beslutning at stoppe løbet, men en smule ærgerligt, da Joshua Gudnitz og jeg sad i et meget lovende udbrud et pænt stykke foran feltet, siger Conrad Haugsted.

item.title: @tadejpogacar finishes off a dominant week with the overall victory.🏆 You don't win a week like this without putting in...
item.description: @tadejpogacar finishes off a dominant week with the overall victory.🏆 You don't win a week like this without putting in the work: Wednesday: 20.3 Strain Thursday: 18.6 Strain Friday: 17.5 Strain Saturday: 10.8 Strain Sunday: 20.1 Strain In his Tour de Suisse debut, Tadej and @uae_team_emirates won 4 of 5 stages, with Tadej taking 3 of them himself. Through relentless climbing, scorching temperatures, and virtually no recovery opportunities, this was one of the toughest tests on the calendar. And with July around the corner, Tadej delivered exactly the statement the cycling world expected.👀

item.title: 🇨🇭 An outstanding performance from Lenny Martinez on the final stage of the Tour de Suisse ❤️ After spending the day i...
item.description:
🇨🇭 An outstanding performance from Lenny Martinez on the final stage of the Tour de Suisse
❤️ After spending the day in the breakaway and taking the HC Col de la Croix KOM sprint, where he won the #rideforGino prize, Lenny attacked on the final climb and looked set for a memorable solo victory.
He fought all the way to the line, only to be overtaken by Pogačar inside the final kilometre, finishing just 7 seconds behind.
A brave ride to be proud of!
#RideAsOne #tourdesuisse
🔗 https://tinyurl.com/4yxkfp2k
📸 Sprint Cycling

item.title: Enric Mas ha terminado 6º la última etapa del 🇨🇭 #TourdeSuisse, una durísima jornada de alta montaña en Villars-sur-Ol...
item.description:
Enric Mas ha terminado 6º la última etapa del 🇨🇭 #TourdeSuisse, una durísima jornada de alta montaña en Villars-sur-Ollon, para cerrar entre los mejores cinco exigentes días de competición.
🏔 También ha brillado desde la fuga Nairo Quintana, que ha formado parte de la escapada del día y ha peleado hasta el final para terminar 10º en un terreno que siempre se le ha dado especialmente bien.
💪 Buena forma de cerrar un renovado Tour de Suiza, con dos corredores entre los diez mejores en una de las etapas más exigentes de todo el año. 
—
Enric Mas finished 6th on the final stage of the 🇨🇭 #TourdeSuisse, a brutal day of high mountains in Villars-sur-Ollon, rounding off five demanding days of racing among the best riders.
🏔 Nairo Quintana also shone from the breakaway, spending the day out front and fighting all the way to the finish to take 10th place on terrain that has always suited him particularly well.
💪 A great way to wrap up a renewed Tour de Suisse, with two riders in the top ten on one of the most demanding stages of the entire season.
📷 SprintCycling
#RodamosJuntos | Movistar España

item.title: ✍️ KASIA LANDS ON STAGE & GC PODIUM AT TOUR DE SUISSE ✍️ Kasia Niewiadoma-Phinney tackled the final stage of Tour de Sui...
item.description:
✍️ KASIA LANDS ON STAGE & GC PODIUM AT TOUR DE SUISSE ✍️
Kasia Niewiadoma-Phinney tackled the final stage of Tour de Suisse Women with hunger, passion and formidable climbing legs, emptying the tank to finish 3rd on the stage and 3rd in the general classification (GC).
The Polish champion was more than satisfied with her efforts on the day and with her five-stage campaign in general, as the sport’s biggest summer target edges ever closer.
“I think that I got what I came here for. There’s a massive goal this summer, and there are things I had to do in order to put myself in better shape. One of those things was coming to Tour de Suisse and trying different approaches to find my strengths – how can I ride later in a tour to have an advantage over others? So, I definitely learned many valuable lessons and I will go home smarter. I know what I still have to improve and what my strengths are, so I think that I got all the insights that I wanted. I definitely wished that I could have dropped Marlen [Reusser] today, to go for the stage victory, but she was too strong and I know that I gave my best. There was nothing extra I could add. When you know that you did your best, you just have to accept the final result.”
Following Friday’s mostly flat stage, where a sensational Zoe Bäckstedt delivered a memorable win for the team, and Saturday’s brutal individual time trial, Kasia arrived at the final stage highly motivated to animate a course tailor-made for the climbers.
Read more ➡️ https://wmncycling.com/kasia-lands-on-stage-gc-podium-at-t…/
Canyon
SRAM road
📷 Lucas Abad

item.title: 🇨🇭 Tour de Suisse - Stage 5 Solide performance de Matthew Riccitello qui termine 5ème de l’étape reine de ce Tour de S...
item.description:
🇨🇭 Tour de Suisse - Stage 5
Solide performance de Matthew Riccitello qui termine 5ème de l’étape reine de ce Tour de Suisse qui se arrivait au sommet de Villars-sur-Ollon. Gros travail de toute l’équipe avec un Sander De Pestel très en forme.
Matthew termine 7ème au classement général et l’équipe prend la 2eme place du classement par équipe notamment grâce à la 14eme place de Tiesj Benoot dont c’était la course de reprise 💪
//
Strong ride from Matthew Riccitello, who finished 5th on the queen stage of the Tour de Suisse, which concluded atop Villars-sur-Ollon.
A great team effort throughout the day, with a particularly impressive Sander De Pestel playing a key role.
Matthew finishes the Tour de Suisse 7th overall, while the team secures 2nd place in the team classification, thanks in part to Tiesj Benoot's 14th-place finish in his comeback race 💪
#DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM Decathlon Switzerland CMA CGM GROUP (Official) Van Rysel
©️ gettysport

item.title: 🇨🇭 #TourdeSuisse | ST 5 After spending the day in the breakaway and taking the HC Col de la Croix KOM, @lennymrtz1 attacked on the final climb and looked set for a memorable solo victory. He only was overtaken by Pogačar inside the final km, finishing just 7 seconds behind @tds

item.title: 🇨🇭 @tds - Stage 5 Solide performance de @MattRiccitello qui termine 5ème de l’étape reine de ce Tour de Suisse qui se terminait au sommet de Villars-sur-Ollon. Gros travail de toute l’équipe avec un Sander de Pestel très en forme. Matthew termine 7ème au classement général. // Strong ride from @mattriccitello, who finished 5th on the queen stage of the Tour de Suisse, which concluded atop Villars-sur-Ollon. A great team effort throughout the day, with a particularly impressive Sander De Pestel playing a key role. Matthew wraps up the race in 7th place overall. #DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM @decathlon @cmacgm @van_rysel 📷 Getty
item.description:
🇨🇭  @tds - Stage 5

Solide performance de  @MattRiccitello qui termine 5ème de l’étape reine de ce Tour de Suisse qui se terminait au sommet de Villars-sur-Ollon. Gros travail de toute l’équipe avec un Sander de Pestel très en forme. Matthew termine 7ème au classement général. 

//

Strong ride from  @mattriccitello, who finished 5th on the queen stage of the Tour de Suisse, which concluded atop Villars-sur-Ollon. A great team effort throughout the day, with a particularly impressive Sander De Pestel playing a key role. Matthew wraps up the race in 7th place overall.

#DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM
@decathlon  @cmacgm  @van_rysel
📷 Getty

— DECATHLON CMA CGM TEAM (@decathloncmacgm) Jun 21, 2026

item.title: 🇧🇪 Baloise Belgium Tour - Stage 5 Le Baloise Belgium Tour se termine sur une 5ème place pour Olav Kooij un peu enfer...
item.description:
🇧🇪 Baloise Belgium Tour - Stage 5
Le Baloise Belgium Tour se termine sur une 5ème place pour Olav Kooij un peu enfermé sur ce dernier sprint. Très gros travail de l'équipe et notamment de Robbe Ghys dans les derniers kilomètres pour permettre au peloton d'arriver groupé.
//
The Baloise Belgium Tour wraps up with a 5th place for Olav Kooij, who was a little boxed in on the final sprint. A tremendous effort from the whole team, and especially from Robbe Ghys, whose work in the closing kilometers ensured a bunch sprint finish.
#DECATHLONCMACGMTEAM
Decathlon Belgium CMA CGM GROUP (Official) Van Rysel Škoda
📷 Gettysport

item.title: 🥉 Alex Aranburu 3e au général ! L’équipe s’est battue jusqu’au bout sur cette dernière étape du Baloise Belgium Tour....
item.description:
🥉 Alex Aranburu 3e au général !
L’équipe s’est battue jusqu’au bout sur cette dernière étape du Baloise Belgium Tour. Vainqueur du dernier Golden KM, Alex Aranburu a tout donné pour défendre son maillot de leader, mais cela n’a malheureusement pas suffi.
🥉 Alex Aranburu finishes 3rd overall at the Baloise Belgium Tour
The team fought until the very end on this final stage. Winner of the final Golden KM, Alex Aranburu gave everything to defend his leader’s jersey, but unfortunately it wasn’t enough.
📷 Getty Images

item.title: Orgullosos de nuestros chicos, que hoy han puesto el broche al 🇮🇹 #GiroNextGen. Javier Cubillas ha asegurado la clasif...
item.description:
Orgullosos de nuestros chicos, que hoy han puesto el broche al 🇮🇹 #GiroNextGen.
Javier Cubillas ha asegurado la clasificación de los jóvenes y finalizado 10.º en la general tras una carrera en la que supo sobreponerse a dos caídas y gestionar cada jornada con inteligencia. También completó una gran carrera Ibai Villate, 12.º en la general y segundo mejor joven de la prueba.
Pero, más allá de los resultados, nos quedamos con la imagen de un equipo que ha corrido como un bloque durante toda la semana. Roger Pareta, Daniele Forlin, Tomás Pombo y Markel Aranaz —que tuvo que abandonar la carrera— han sido un ejemplo de compromiso y trabajo colectivo.
Hay FUTURO. 💙
#RodamosJuntos | Movistar España
—
Proud of our guys, who today brought the 🇮🇹 #GiroNextGen to a close.
Javier Cubillas secured the youth classification and finished 10th overall after a race in which he overcame two crashes and managed every stage with great maturity and intelligence. Ibai Villate also completed an excellent race, finishing 12th overall and as the second-best young rider in the event.
But beyond the results, what we take away most is the image of a team that raced as one unit throughout the week. Roger Pareta, Daniele Forlin, Tomás Pombo and Markel Aranaz — who was forced to abandon the race — were a great example of commitment and teamwork.
The FUTURE is bright. 💙
#RodamosJuntos | Movistar España

item.title: Stage 5 @tourofsloveniaofficial 🇸🇮 - @davidlozano21 made the early move into the breakaway, but the climbs had other i...
item.description: Stage 5 @tourofsloveniaofficial 🇸🇮 - @davidlozano21 made the early move into the breakaway, but the climbs had other ideas. Dropped early, he didn’t fold, he dug in and rode himself all the way back to 36th, leading the team home. 💪 @samuelnealbrand right there with him in 39th after a strong team ride. Up next: our annual summer training camp, part of the Talent ID pipeline 🔍 — giving riders living with type 1 diabetes the chance to chase the dream of turning pro. 📸 @sprintcycling #DrivingChange #Diabetes

item.title: Stage 5 of the Tour of Slovenia 🇸🇮 tested every ounce of the experienced David Lozano's resolve. 💪 He earned his spot...
item.description:
Stage 5 of the Tour of Slovenia 🇸🇮 tested every ounce of the experienced David Lozano's resolve. 💪
He earned his spot in the day's breakaway right from the gun a bold, early statement of intent. But the race had other plans. A brutal pace on the first climbs split the move apart almost immediately, and David found himself isolated, dropped from the front.
He dug in, rode himself back together, and crossed the line 36th, leading the team home. Sam Brand wasn't far behind in 39th, capping off a hard-fought day for the whole squad.
"After that I was just really empty, but I managed to finish quite strong with what I had left," David said. "Now it's time to get ready for the second part of the season, which is really important for us racing 'home' in both Denmark and the US." - Lozano said.
That next chapter starts soon. The team is regrouping for its annual summer training camp, part of our Talent ID pipeline where riders living with type 1 diabetes who dream of going pro get their shot to show what they can do.
Report: https://www.teamnovonordisk.com/…/team-novo-nordisk-fights…/ #DrivingChange #Diabetes

item.title: ⛰️ Simon Carr 6️⃣e de l’Andorra Clàssica Offensive tout au long de la journée, l’équipe a pris part à l’échappée matinal...
item.description:
⛰️ Simon Carr 6️⃣e de l’Andorra Clàssica
Offensive tout au long de la journée, l’équipe a pris part à l’échappée matinale avant de se montrer à l’avant dans le final. Simon Carr conclut avec une solide 6️⃣e place au sommet du Col de la Botella, devant Ion Izagirre 9️⃣e.
⛰️ Simon Carr finishes 6️⃣th in the @laclassica_ad
Aggressive throughout the day, the team was active in the early breakaway before showing up at the front again in the final. Simon Carr capped off the effort with a strong 6️⃣th place at the summit of the Col de la Botella, just ahead of Ion Izagirre in 9️⃣th.
📷 Aubin Lipke et Getty Images

item.title: ⛰️ Simon Carr 6️⃣e de l’Andorra Clàssica Offensive tout au long de la journée, l’équipe a pris part à l’échappée matinale avant de se montrer à l’avant dans le final. Simon Carr conclut avec une solide 6️⃣e place au sommet du Col de la Botella, devant Ion Izagirre 9️⃣e. ⛰️ Simon Carr finishes 6️⃣th in the #AndorraClàssica Aggressive throughout the day, the team was active in the early breakaway before showing up at the front again in the final. Simon Carr capped off the effort with a strong 6️⃣th place at the summit of the Col de la Botella, just ahead of Ion Izagirre in 9️⃣th. 📷 Aubin Lipke
item.description:
⛰️ Simon Carr 6️⃣e de l’Andorra Clàssica

Offensive tout au long de la journée, l’équipe a pris part à l’échappée matinale avant de se montrer à l’avant dans le final. Simon Carr conclut avec une solide 6️⃣e place au sommet du Col de la Botella, devant Ion Izagirre 9️⃣e.

⛰️ Simon Carr finishes 6️⃣th in the  #AndorraClàssica

Aggressive throughout the day, the team was active in the early breakaway before showing up at the front again in the final. Simon Carr capped off the effort with a strong 6️⃣th place at the summit of the Col de la Botella, just ahead of Ion Izagirre in 9️⃣th.

📷 Aubin Lipke

— Team Cofidis (@TeamCOFIDIS) Jun 21, 2026

item.description:
From the breakaway to the top 10 👏
Nina showed her fighting spirit on the queen stage of the Tour de Suisse Women, spending much of the day on the attack before finishing 9th on the stage and 12th in the final GC.
A fantastic team effort throughout the week, with a podium and multiple top-10 finishes to show for it.
Hear from Nina at our link in bio 🔗
📸 gettysport  
#HPHCycling #TrueHealthIsSelfMade #FactorRacing #UCIWWT #vergesport

item.title: 🇪🇸 La #VoltaCatalunya llegó a su final con protagonismo para nuestras corredoras. Paula Ostiz fue la gran animadora de...
item.description:
🇪🇸 La #VoltaCatalunya llegó a su final con protagonismo para nuestras corredoras.
Paula Ostiz fue la gran animadora de la última etapa, formando parte de la escapada del día y destacando por su actitud, con varios ataques que mantuvieron viva la aventura hasta los kilómetros finales en Barcelona. 💪
Además, Laura Ruiz fue octava en la volata final, midiéndose con algunas de las corredoras más rápidas del pelotón.
—
🇪🇸 #VoltaCatalunya came to an end with our riders playing a leading role.
Paula Ostiz was one of the key protagonists of the final stage, making the day’s breakaway and showing her fighting spirit with several attacks that kept the move alive deep into the final kilometres in Barcelona. 💪
Meanwhile, Laura Ruiz sprinted to eighth place in the final dash to the line, competing against some of the fastest riders in the peloton.
📷 SprintCycling
#RodamosJuntos | Movistar España

item.title: Un fin de semana mágico en el 🇨🇭 #TourdeSuisse. Marlen Reusser ha completado dos días perfectos al sumar la victoria e...
item.description:
Un fin de semana mágico en el 🇨🇭 #TourdeSuisse. Marlen Reusser ha completado dos días perfectos al sumar la victoria en Villars-sur-Ollon a su triunfo en la contrarreloj de ayer, asegurando así la clasificación general de la carrera de casa.
🙌 Arropada por un sólido trabajo colectivo durante toda la jornada, Marlen ha rematado la faena con un ataque en el último kilómetro para sellar su tercer triunfo en la ronda suiza, además de llevarse también la clasificación por puntos.
Un resultado muy especial tras superar semanas complicadas y una nueva demostración de ambición, resiliencia y trabajo en EQUIPO. 💙
—
A magical weekend at the 🇨🇭 #TourdeSuisse. Marlen Reusser completed two perfect days by adding victory in Villars-sur-Ollon to yesterday’s time trial success, securing the overall classification of her home race.
💪 Backed by a strong collective effort throughout the stage, Marlen put the finishing touch on her performance with an attack in the final kilometre to seal her third overall victory in the Swiss race, while also claiming the points classification.
A very special result after overcoming difficult weeks and another demonstration of ambition, resilience and TEAMWORK. 💙
#RodamosJuntos | Movistar España

item.title: Mattia Gaffuri is on the attack in the final stage of the Tour de Suisse! He’s part of a strong 11-rider breakaway, and with 56km of racing already in the books, the group holds a 2-minute advantage over the peloton 🗻 #TDS2026🇨🇭
item.description:
Mattia Gaffuri is on the attack in the final stage of the Tour de Suisse! He’s part of a strong 11-rider breakaway, and with 56km of racing already in the books, the group holds a 2-minute advantage over the peloton 🗻

#TDS2026🇨🇭

— Team Picnic PostNL (@picnicpostnl) Jun 21, 2026

item.title: RT by @FundaCiclisEusk: RT by @FundaCiclisEusk: #LaboralKutxaEuskadi 💜 #VoltaCatalunya Saririk gabeko egun gogorra 🥵 Eguna oso bizia izan da eta beroak berriz ere lasterketa asko gogortu du. Azkenengo kilometrotan lanean ibili garen arren, Bartzelonako bukaeran ezin izan gara onenen artean egon. El día ha sido muy rápido y el calor ha vuelto a endurecer mucho la carrera. Aunque hemos trabajado durante los últimos kilómetros, en el final de Barcelona no hemos podido estar entre las mejores. Begirada helburu berrietan ipintzeko ordua 💪 📸 Sprint Cycling
item.description:
#LaboralKutxaEuskadi 💜  #VoltaCatalunya

Saririk gabeko egun gogorra 🥵

Eguna oso bizia izan da eta beroak berriz ere lasterketa asko gogortu du. Azkenengo kilometrotan lanean ibili garen arren, Bartzelonako bukaeran ezin izan gara onenen artean egon.

El día ha sido muy rápido y el calor ha vuelto a endurecer mucho la carrera. Aunque hemos trabajado durante los últimos kilómetros, en el final de Barcelona no hemos podido estar entre las mejores.

Begirada helburu berrietan ipintzeko ordua 💪

📸 Sprint Cycling

— @LABORALkTeam Jun 21, 2026

item.description:
Top 🔟 pour Valentine Fortin !
Bien emmenée par ses coéquipières, notre sprinteuse décroche la 10e place dans les rues de Barcelone sur la dernière étape de la Volta a Catalunya.
Well supported by her teammates, our sprinter secured 10th place in the streets of Barcelona on the final stage of the Volta a Catalunya.
📷 Getty Images
